zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Humphrey Coningsby於1459年出生在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾洛克時，他的父親Thomas Coningsby40歲，母親Catharine Waldiffe19歲。他於1478年與Alice Fereby在英國結婚。他於1509年被列為justice of the king's bench。他去世於1535年6月2日在英國英格蘭賀特福爾阿爾登哈姆享年76歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀特福爾阿爾登哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Humphrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman name, Hunfrid, of Germanic origin, derived from hun ‘bear-cub, warrior’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. The Norman form absorbed the native Old English form, Hunfrith, which existed in England before the Conquest. The spelling with -ph- reflects classicizing influence. Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. He was noted as a patron of literature, and founded what became the Bodleian Library at Oxford. In modern times, probably the most famous bearer has been the film star Humphrey Bogart ( 1899–1957 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Humphrey Coningsby was born in 1459, in Rock, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Coningsby, was 40 and his mother, Catharine Waldiffe, was 19. He married Alice Fereby in 1478, in England. In 1509, his occupation is listed as justice of the king's bench. He died on 2 June 1535, in Aldenham, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 76, and was buried in Aldenham, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Humphrey Coningsby est né en 1459, à Rock, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Coningsby, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Catharine Waldiffe, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Alice Fereby en 1478, à Angleterre. En 1509, sa profession de son indiquée est justice of the king's bench. Il est décédé le 2 juin 1535, à Aldenham, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Aldenham, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Humphrey Coningsbyが1459年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアロックで生まれた時，父Thomas Coningsbyは40歳，母Catharine Waldiffeは19歳であった。1478年にイギリスでAlice Ferebyと結婚した。1509年，職業はjustice of the king's benchと記録されている。彼は1535年6月2日にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアアルデンハムで76歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアアルデンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Humphrey Coningsby(이)가 1459년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 록에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Coningsby(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Catharine Waldiffe(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1478년 영국에서 Alice Fereby(와)과 결혼했다. 1509년, 그의 직업은 justice of the king's bench이었다. 그는 1535년 6월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 알데함에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 알데함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Humphrey Coningsby nasceu em 1459, em Rock, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Coningsby, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Catharine Waldiffe, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Fereby em 1478, em Inglaterra. Em 1509, sua profissão aparece como justice of the king's bench. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Humphrey Coningsby родился в 1459 г. в местности рокк, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Coningsby было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Catharine Waldiffe, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Fereby в 1478 г. в местности Англия. В 1509 году он работал по профессии justice of the king's bench. Он умер 2 июня 1535 г. в местности алденам, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности алденам, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Humphrey Coningsby nació en 1459, en Rock, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Coningsby, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Catharine Waldiffe, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Alice Fereby en 1478, en Inglaterra. En 1509, su ocupación registrada era justice of the king's bench. Murió el 2 de junio de 1535, en Aldenham, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en Aldenham, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
